programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons Marjoe Gortner steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood Pamela Sue Martin and becomes attached to the town hes come to think of as his sanctuary So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople

programme.title: The One Eyed Soldiers
programme.desc: A doctors unexpected death in a central European republic sets a series of chilling events into motion

programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid Roy Rogers stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds the man who killed his brother Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup Bob Steele the Kid takes a job as the saloons bouncer While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison Pauline Moore the Kid discovers a swindled miner Noah Beery Jr who claims to be the Carson City Kid

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturized in a secret experiment and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk

programme.title: Perry Mason The case of the reckless romeo
programme.desc: Sleazy talk show host Ted Mayne has a tell-all book that enrages prominent women One actress Roxanne Shield makes a televised death threat Ted is murdered and she is charged Witnesses say they saw her outside his apartment that night

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimbles David Janssen anti-smog crusading friend Laurence Naismith has him deliver a package secretly containing a bomb to a polluting factory unaware that children are there

programme.title: Seahunt
programme.desc: While testing the skills of two divers Mike is attacked by one of them whom is suffering from rapture of the deep

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike is asked to investigate when two underwater geologists disappear one of whom washes up on the beach with marks of a struggle with a gigantic octopus

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: A pilot a major with a 918th has a murderous hatred for all Germans and Col Gallagher must find a way to channel him or stop him

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Julia attempts to save herself by hiding her notebook in the grandfather clock After Carolyn snaps at Julia Elizabeth insists she apologize

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time period Barnabas searches for Josette while Angelique schemes for his love She refuses to use a love spell on him but she does send him a stranger in a vision Barnabas finds Josettes veil

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time period Natalie questions Victoria and Abigall and Naomi argue Joshua appears in front of Abigail in Victorias room

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time period Josette wakes up in Jeremiahs arms but later she regrets marrying Jeremiah Joshua tells Andre and Barnabas that Abigail has engaged the Rev Trask to hunt for the witch

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan moves to the other side of the island when the other castaways suddenly become allergic to him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds sunflower seeds on the island that gives him the ability to read minds and when the fellow castaways find out they want in on the action

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Grampa refuses to give him a raise Pepino quits and goes to work for neighbor George MacMichael

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa is in desperate need of character witnesses to testify on his behalf at his parking ticket trial

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS impersonators are running around causing chaos in CONTROL

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 go to a South American country dressed as flamenco dancers to save the President of the country

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When High Ball Trucking corners the regional supply on diesel and tries to squeeze out the independent carriers BJ taps an alternative fuel source guaranteed to keep him ahead of Hammer and a pesky revenuer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and his neighbor Roger are banished to the barn by their wives

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is stolen and hidden in a sorority house basement Its Wilbur dressed in drag to the rescue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: There seems to be a traitor in the escaped prisoner pipeline and Hogan has to find him by following the escape route

programme.title: Hogans Heroes

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A Japanese gallery owner denies his violent ninja heritage until American drug traffickers kidnap his young son

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Whilst he is exploring an asteroid Koenig is taken over by an alien race known as the Kalthon who replace him with an exact double In consequence every action ordered by the fake Koenig is solely for the benefit of the Kalthon and to the detriment of the welfare of the Alphans Helena realizes that something is wrong when Koenig is cold to the touch and needs to convince the other crew members

programme.title: The Wizard of Speed and Time
programme.desc: A Hollywood filmmaker Mike Jittlov makes a short for an evil film studio Unbeknownest to him the producer has placed a bet of 25000 that he wont come up with anything with a use Luckily our film creator gets the help of his friends

programme.desc: Victoria poses as a thief in order to become an inmate and investigate conditions at a womens prison Once in she finds it is a miserable place and that she may never be able to leave

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 46 opens with a rare treat: a ladies pro match between champions in differening disciplines, both looking to make their transition to MMA. Lindsay Garbatt is a former World Champion in Boxing while Valeria Mejia is a Pan-American Champion in Sambo. Following this is the main event of the evening, a challenge for the vacant Bantamweight title between Jesse Arnett and Dimitri Waardenburg! You do not want to miss this!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Kes Mamba v. Wesley Johnson

programme.desc: Tara LaRosa is a former student of all-world fighter Royce Gracie. She takes on perhaps the only woman who has a fighting chance to put the hurt on her…Amanda Buckner.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Any world-class MMA fighter is fearless. Then there’s Nick Agallar who spent 16 months serving his country in Iraq. His opponent Debrah is lightning fast, dishes out lethal strikes and got a few grappling lessons from the Gracie clan along the way.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: In this episode, Melissa Croden speaks about some of the things she struggles with as a fighter and how she overcomes those obstacles. Find out how Melissa started out this fight with nerves and anxiety but how she pulled out a huge win against Brittany Paterson.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Kes Mamba v. Wesley Johnson

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smeltzer's journey into MMA began 12 years ago, through Karate. Chris' work as a School Bus driver fits perfectly with his MMA lifestyle, allowing him the flexibility to train throughout the day, as well run a karate school for kids. The martial artist lifestyle helped bring structure to all areas of Chris' life. He believes he has become a better person through Martial Arts, and he makes the mental distinction between between being a fighter and being Martial Artist. He prefers the standup game feels he is progressing well to being an all around fighter with his BJJ Blue Belt.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Main Event - Sheldon Gaines v. Nate Smandych

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: To save time the Pride goes through instead of around the Phantom Nebula to warn the legendary Swap Witch of Saw Boss imminent arrival Flora feels her presence and Swamp Witch reveals herself to Flora The witch has special communication powers

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: When the planets are in line with each other in this particular galaxy it creates a temporary portal out of this universe into a universe of opposites where the evil halves of personalities live Saw Boss tries to trick Jayce into it

programme.title: Mask 165
programme.desc: Mask 165

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Maori Chief Kaitaia has a map to Glow Worm Grotto tattooed on his back VENOM needs this information to find the grotto and steal the pearl treasure inside

programme.desc: Brothers of Destiny

programme.title: Teknoman

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The adventurers meet a girl from their world who has accurate dreams of the future

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The Realm is being destroyed by a horrible Demo-Dragon The only weapon that can stop it is the Treasure of Tardos but even if they get it the team will need a most unlikely ally

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain are warned that MAD plan to steal rare pieces of art from the Modern Art Museum in New York and replace them with fakes

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget interrupts his holiday in Hawaii to stop MAD from turning it into their latest missile base by pretending that an ancient volcano is still active
